title: senecio sinicus
intro: Senecio sinicus, also known as the variegated geranium-leaf groundsel, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Senecio sinicus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving respiratory function, as well as being used to treat fever and other related conditions. The plant is often prepared as a tea or used in herbal infusions for its medicinal properties, although its use should be avoided due to potential toxicity.
